title: iberis grosii
intro: Iberis grosii, also known as Candytuft, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Iberis grosii include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, and it can also be consumed as a sweet, fragrant herb in salads and desserts.
